goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory audit receipt record artifact builder for runtime patch audit receipt record authorities without runtime execution, patch application, route/server mutation, durable record writes, audit persistence, or permit consumption.
scope_out: Do not execute runtime, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, write durable records, receipts, or audits, perform durable writes, consume permits, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Runtime audit receipt record authority artifacts can produce an in-memory record artifact.
Recorded-at ref and audit receipt record evidence ref are required.
Runtime execution, execution allowance, audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, route mutation, server mutation, and permit consumption remain false.
assumptions: Durable audit receipt record persistence requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing evidence ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Runtime execution, patch application, route mutation, server mutation, durable record write, receipt write, audit persistence, durable write, permit consumption, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-189 authorized runtime audit receipt record artifacts without recording them.
